nodes.name: Long-billed honeyeater
nodes.summary: Long-billed honeyeater（Melilestes megarhynchus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Long-billed honeyeater。

nodes.name: Long-billed honeyeater
nodes.summary: The long-billed honeyeater (Melilestes megarhynchus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is monotypic within the genus Melilestes. Distribution and habitat It is found in New Guinea and offshore islands, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. Long-billed honeyeaters do not migrate. The average generation length of it is 5.8 years. References
